exchanges.prompt: Design a cloud-native e-commerce platform using AWS S3 for product images and backups, Azure Functions for order processing and notifications, and GCP BigQuery for sales analytics. Use Kubernetes for container orchestration. Include CI/CD pipelines, autoscaling, load balancing, monitoring, disaster recovery, and secure communication between clouds.

response.content:
architecture-beta
    group frontend(cloud)[Presentation Layer]
    group application(server)[Application Layer]
    group data(disk)[Data Layer]
    group analytics(chart)[Analytics Layer]
    group monitoring(cloud)[Monitoring Layer]
    group security(lock)[Security Layer]

    service web(logos:nginx)[Web Server] in frontend
    service ci_cd(logos:docker)[CI/CD Pipeline] in frontend
    service k8s(logos:kubernetes)[Kubernetes Cluster] in application
    service azure_func(logos:azure)[Azure Functions] in application
    service gcp_bigquery(logos:google-cloud)[GCP BigQuery] in analytics
    service aws_s3(logos:aws-s3)[AWS S3] in data
    service load_balancer(logos:nginx)[Load Balancer] in application
    service autoscaler(logos:kubernetes)[Autoscaler] in application
    service monitor(logos:aws-cloudwatch)[Monitoring] in monitoring
    service dr(logos:aws-cloudfront)[Disaster Recovery] in security
    service vpn(logos:aws-ecs)[Secure Communication] in security

    web:R -- L:load_balancer
    load_balancer:R -- L:k8s
    k8s:R -- L:azure_func
    azure_func:R -- L:gcp_bigquery
    azure_func:B -- T:aws_s3
    aws_s3:B -- T:monitor
    k8s:B -- T:autoscaler
    autoscaler:R -- L:load_balancer
    gcp_bigquery:R -- L:monitor
    monitor:R -- L:dr
    dr:R -- L:vpn
    ci_cd:R -- L:web
    vpn:B -- T:k8s
